name: com.thesevensages.rolebot
description: RoleBot enables users to easily add FULLY LOCAL AI chatbots, with automatic speech detection and voice synthesis, to projects. It's easy to set up and will compile to most Unity build targets.

samples.description: Demonstrates how to use the ChatEngine to set up a simple text-based chatbot.
A TTS-only demo, set up with the TTSEngine.
Uses STTEngine to transcribe microphone input in real time.
Combines STT, Chat, and TTS Engines to create an AI you can speak to and it'll speak back!
Provides samples for triggers. Triggers are tools that can modify the behavior of RoleBot during runtime.
